news.headline: Smilegate invests in Dan Houser's Absurd Ventures to boost global gaming reach, creating new growth opportunities.
news.summary: Smilegate, with its strong knowledge of Asian markets, alongside Dan Houser and the Absurd Ventures team's rich experience in creating blockbuster AAA games, intends to generate extensive and lasting business prospects on a global scale. The announcement was made in Santa Monica, California on December 3, 2024, showcasing the potential for growth and innovation in the industry.

news.headline: Shanna Lord named Executive Director of Watercrest Macon Assisted Living and Memory Care in Macon, GA.
news.summary: Watercrest Senior Living Group is pleased to appoint Shanna Lord as the Executive Director of Watercrest Macon Assisted Living and Memory Care Community in Macon, Georgia. This award-winning community welcomes Lord, a seasoned executive, to lead the facility.

news.headline: Instacart's CFO Emily Reuter to join fireside chat at Nasdaq London Investor Conference on Dec 10, 2024, 9:00 a.m. GMT.
news.summary: In San Francisco on December 3, 2024, Instacart (NASDAQ: CART) revealed that CFO Emily Reuter is set to engage in a fireside discussion during the Nasdaq 51st London Investor Conference on December 10, 2024, starting at 9:00 a.m. GMT. The event will provide an audio webcast for viewers.

news.headline: Goldman Sachs cautions Trump's 25% tariff on NAFTA could lead to 4% GDP shrink for Canada, Mexico, and 0.4% for U.S.
news.summary: President-elect Donald Trump's proposed 25% tariff on imports from Canada and Mexico may have severe economic consequences. Goldman Sachs predicts that Canada and Mexico could see their GDP shrink by as much as 4% under the tariff, with the U.S. GDP possibly contracting by 0.4%. Every 10% increase in tariffs could reduce Canada's GDP by 1.5% and Mexico's by 2%. With a full 25% tariff, these figures could rise to over 2.5% for Canada and 3.5% for Mexico. The economists also warn of surging consumer prices and a slowdown in U.S. growth due to the proposed tariffs.

news.headline: Intel plans to compensate former CEO Gelsinger with a potential payout of $10 million.

Bitwise unveils momentum-based "Trendwise" strategies in 3 crypto futures ETFs, moving between crypto & treasuries based on price trends to enhance risk-adjusted returns. Investors can access through Bit.
news.summary: Bitwise Asset Management, a crypto specialist based in San Francisco, has disclosed the transformation of three crypto futures ETFs from long-only tactics to techniques that alternate between cryptocurrencies and U.S. Treasuries. The decision comes as a response to price trends in the crypto market. The exclusive momentum-driven strategies aim to assist investors seeking Bitcoin or Ethereum exposure in enhancing their risk-adjusted returns by effectively handling downside risk. Interested investors can now tap into the Trendwise strategies through Bitwise.

news.headline: Backblaze partners with Philadelphia Eagles to showcase media production speed and security; will present case study at Sports Video Group Summit.
news.summary: Based in San Mateo, Backblaze, Inc. (Nasdaq: BLZE) is known for its innovative cloud storage services as an alternative to conventional providers. It recently revealed plans to showcase a groundbreaking media production case study alongside the Philadelphia Eagles at the Sports Video Group (SVG) Summit Cloud Production Workshop in New York City on Dec. 16. The session, titled “Protecting QBs and PBs: Moving from tape to cloud for real-time production access and resiliency,” will highlight the transition to cloud storage for improved efficiency and accessibility.

news.summary: A major bank based in Anaheim, California, has chosen Cotribute's Consumer Account Opening module to streamline the process of opening accounts for Health Savings Accounts (HSAs). This decision aims to simplify and enhance the experience for customers applying for HSAs with a focus on improving efficiency.

news.headline: Spotify showcases Cey Adams' 40-year art career at The Art of Hip Hop during Miami Art Week. Celebrating the artist's journey and accomplishments.
news.summary: An event in Miami on December 3, 2024, will highlight the career of Cey Adams, known for being the Founding Creative Director at DEF JAM Recordings. The retrospective exhibition, titled Departure: 40 Years of Art and Design, is being hosted by Art of Hip Hop. This event will celebrate Adams' contributions to the art world and showcase his work over the span of 40 years. The exhibition aims to honor the contemporary artist and his significant impact on the industry.

news.headline: FCC grants Globalstar 15-year renewal for mobile earth terminal authorization with US and French-licensed NGSO satellites.
news.summary: Globalstar, Inc. disclosed that the FCC granted GUSA Licensee LLC a 15-year renewal for its operation of various mobile earth terminals with U.S. and French-licensed NGSO satellites in the United States. Globalstar, a leading mobile satellite and communications services provider, obtained this authorization from the FCC. The renewal signifies a substantial extension in their authority to operate with their NGSO satellites in both countries. This development was unveiled by Globalstar, listed on the NYSE American as GSAT.

news.headline: Ventas (NYSE: VTR) announces Brookdale Senior Living did not extend Master Lease term from January 1, 2026.
news.summary: In Chicago, Ventas, Inc. (NYSE: VTR) revealed that Brookdale Senior Living did not opt to extend the Master Lease agreement with Ventas, expiring on January 1, 2026. This decision means Brookdale forfeits the option to prolong the lease for any assets under the Master Lease. Ventas plans to utilize its Ventas OITM platform and playbook for the transition.

news.headline: Watches of Switzerland Group partners with Zillion to provide instant insurance at point of sale for watch and jewelry purchases.
news.summary: A partnership has been announced between Watches of Switzerland Group and embedded insurance provider Zillion in Boston. The collaboration aims to enhance client experiences by offering instant coverage for watch and jewelry purchases through a simple one-click process on mobile devices. Clients no longer need applications, appraisals, or downloads to access this benefit. This seamless service upgrade is designed to provide an elevated experience for customers. The collaboration promises to transform the way clients interact with their purchases and consolidates the commitment to delivering exceptional service.

news.headline: Chainlink's price jumps 15% in one day to $24 with $15.05 billion market cap. Trader sentiment grows, seeing undervaluation.
news.summary: The notable surge in Chainlink's (CRYPTO: LINK) value is being supported by robust fundamentals, a significant strategic partnership, and a growing positive sentiment amongst traders who perceive the altcoin as undervalued. The latest cryptocurrency figures exhibit LINK priced at $24.00 with a market capitalization of $15.05 billion, marking a 14.5% increase in the last 24 hours and a 42.8% jump over the past week. Conversely, XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) stands at $2.61 with a market cap of $148.7 billion, showing a 7.4% rise in the last 24 hours and an impressive 91.9% surge in the past week. Stellar (CRYPTO: XLM) is priced at $0.523 with a market cap of $15.7 billion, showcasing a negligible -0.01% fluctuation in the last 24 hours but an 18.3% increase over the week. WeRate co-founder Quinten Francois highlighted LINK's high illiquidity, driven by long-term holders holding out for prices above $100, which could result in a supply crunch due to resilient sellers and adamant believers, potentially triggering rapid price escalations akin to previous XRP and XLM rallies. For more details, please refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Hapbee introduces a new Smart Sleep Pad to tackle the global sleep crisis, providing personalized solutions to improve health.
news.summary: Hapbee Technologies, Inc. has introduced a new digital wellness solution aimed at addressing the worldwide sleep crisis. This initiative is backed by positive customer input and an increasing body of research underlining the profound influence of sleep on holistic health. Hapbee has disclosed this development without specifying the source.

news.headline: BioAdaptives, Inc. approved a one-for-one stock dividend for common stockholders owning shares on the Record Date.

news.headline: Winners of VicOne and Block Harbor Capture the Flag Competition, Robbe Derks and Greg Hogan honored at Auto-ISAC Cybersecurity Summit in Detroit.
news.summary: VicOne and Block Harbor revealed the winners of the 2024 Automotive Capture the Flag (CTF) competition as Robbe Derks from Belgium and Greg Hogan from the United States. The announcement was made during an awards ceremony on October 23 at the Auto-ISAC Cybersecurity Summit in Detroit. VicOne, a leader in automotive cybersecurity solutions, is based in Detroit, while Block Harbor, a respected automotive cybersecurity engineering firm, is located in Tokyo. The competition showcased talents in cybersecurity, with participants from various countries competing. The event attracted significant attention within the industry, with representatives from leading automotive companies in attendance.

news.headline: BigID introduces Data Activity Monitoring to enhance data security, the first DSPM provider to offer near real-time monitoring.- Date: Dec 3, 2024- Company: BigID- Key feature: Data Activity Monitoring- Focus: Data security, privacy, compliance, AI data management.

news.headline: Veeam launches new enterprise capabilities in Veeam Data Platform v12.3, including Microsoft Entra ID Protection and Nutanix AHV protection with Gen AI reporting.

news.headline: Amazon reports highest sales ever during Thanksgiving week, setting a new record for items sold.
